title: Nathiya Nathiya Lyrics Poo Mazhai Pozhiyuthu
stanzas:
<div>
Nathiya Nathiya Lyrics Poo Mazhai Pozhiyuthu

Nathiya nathiya
nile nadhiya
nadhi pol neliyum
nadayaa
idaithaan kodiyaa
kodimel kaniyaa
kondaada naanillaiyaa

Nathiya nathiya
nile nadhiya
nadhi pol neliyum
nadayaa
idaithaan kodiyaa
kodimel kaniyaa
kondaada neeillaiyaa

oru poomazhaithaan
ingu pozhiyuthu paar
nee punnagai purigaiyile

thaen mazhai thaan
kannil valiyuthu paar
nee tharisanam tharugaiyile

mazhai thooralilum
mani saaralilum
udal kulir kondu
thavippathenna

kan padavum nee
kai thodavum konjam
kulirvittu povathenna

raathiriyil nam raajiyathil
oru neerodai paaivathenna
adhuthaan adhuthaan
unakkum enakkum
kondaattam kummaalam

Nathiya nathiya
nile nadhiya
nadhi pol neliyum
nadayaa
idaithaan kodiyaa
kodimel kaniyaa
kondaada naanillaiyaa

oru yaedirukku
kadhai ezhuthivaithu
nee iravinil padippatharkku

yaenguthaiyaa siru
thamarai poo
nee thaenalli kudippatharkku

oru koodirukku
ilam kuruvi vandhu
mazhai kaalathil paduppatharku

paal irukku
malai palamirukku
konda pasiyinai
thanippathrakku

kaal thodangi
malar koonthal varai
un kai vannam kandaal enna

medhuva medhuva
varavaa varavaa
onndu onnaaga.

Nathiya nathiya
nile nadhiya
nadhi pol neliyum
nadayaa
idaithaan kodiyaa
kodimel kaniyaa
kondaada neeillaiyaa

Nathiya nathiya
nile nadhiya
nadhi pol neliyum
nadayaa
idaithaan kodiyaa
kodimel kaniyaa
kondaada naanillaiyaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nathiya Nathiya'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

The song is featured in the movie Poo Mazhai Pozhiyuthu, enhancing the romantic narrative between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Nathiya Nathiya'?

The song is sung by the legendary artists K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubrahmanyam.

When was 'Nathiya Nathiya' released?

The song was released on April 20, 1987.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the enchanting song Nathiya Nathiya, the lyrical beauty intertwines with the soulful voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubrahmanyam. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance, perfectly complementing the emotional landscape of the movie Poo Mazhai Pozhiyuthu. It captures the essence of love, making it a timeless classic that resonates with listeners. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of warmth and affection, inviting listeners to reminisce about their own romantic experiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nathiya Nathiya is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. Featuring the enchanting voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubrahmanyam, this song is a classic from the legendary composer Ilaiyaraaja. Dive into the soothing vibes of Poo Mazhai Pozhiyuthu and let the music transport you to a world of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Like a river, flowing like a stream, I am not the one who can hold you tightly.
Like a river, flowing like a stream, you are not the one who can hold me tightly.
A flower shower is falling here, look at your smile in the reflection.
Honey rain is falling in your eyes, look at the vision you are giving.
What is the use of cooling the body in the rain and mist?
What is the use of you holding my hand and cooling off a bit?
In the night, in our kingdom, what is the use of a water flow? That is the dance for both of us.
Like a river, flowing like a stream, I am not the one who can hold you tightly.
You are writing a story for a journey, to learn about the heart.
Where are you, little lotus flower, to drink the honey?
A little bird comes to a shelter to sing in the rainy season.
Milk is there, the mountain has milk, to quench the thirst of hunger.
When the time starts, if you see the flower bloom, what will happen?
Will sweetness come, will sweetness come, one will become one.
Like a river, flowing like a stream, you are not the one who can hold me tightly.
Like a river, flowing like a stream, I am not the one who can hold you tightly.
